SEARCH

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Methods
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    ru.tehkode.permissions.commands.CommandsManager.getInstance()
    Compatibility no-op; PEXPlus does not expose a live CommandsManager.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.getAllParentGroups()
    Use PermissionEntity.getAllParents() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.getParentGroups()
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.getParentGroups(String)
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents(String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.getParentGroupsNames()
    Use PermissionEntity.getOwnParentIdentifiers() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.getParentGroupsNames(String)
    Use PermissionEntity.getOwnParentIdentifiers(String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.setParentGroupObjects(List<PermissionGroup>)
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.setParentGroupObjects(List<PermissionGroup>, String)
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List, String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.setParentGroups(List<String>)
    Use PermissionEntity.setParentsIdentifier(List) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionGroup.setParentGroups(List<String>, String)
    Use PermissionEntity.setParentsIdentifier(List, String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.cacheUser(String, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.clearUserCache(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.clearUserCache(UUID)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.clearUserCache(Player)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.createBackend(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.end()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getActiveUsers()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getBackend()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getConfiguration()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getDefaultGroups(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getExecutor()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroup(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroupList()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroupNames()
    prefer resolving groups via PermissionManager.getGroupList() or the backend
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroups()
    prefer PermissionManager.getGroupList()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroups(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroups(String, boolean)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroups(String, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getGroups(String, String, boolean)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getLogger()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getPermissionMatcher()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getRankLadder(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUser(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUser(UUID)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUser(Player)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUserIdentifiers()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUserNames()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUsers()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUsers(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUsers(String, boolean)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUsers(String, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getUsers(String, String, boolean)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.getWorldInheritance(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.has(String, String, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.has(UUID, String, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.has(Player, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.has(Player, String, String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.initTimer()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.isDebug()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.reset()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.reset(boolean)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.resetGroup(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.resetUser(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.resetUser(Player)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.setBackend(String)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.setDebug(boolean)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.setPermissionMatcher(PermissionMatcher)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.setWorldInheritance(String, List<String>)
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.shouldCreateUserRecords()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionManager.shouldSaveDefaultGroup()
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.demote(PermissionUser, String)
    Prefer PermissionsEx.getApi().getLadderManager().demote(user, ladderName) (modern dev.rono.permissions.api.ladder.LadderManager). This method remains for binary compatibility with hook plugins compiled against older releases.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getAllGroups()
    Use PermissionEntity.getAllParents() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getGroupNames()
    Use PermissionEntity.getOwnParentIdentifiers() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getGroupNames(String)
    Use PermissionEntity.getOwnParentIdentifiers(String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getGroups()
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getGroups(String)
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents(String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getGroupsNames()
    Use PermissionEntity.getParentIdentifiers() instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.getGroupsNames(String)
    Use PermissionEntity.getParentIdentifiers(String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.promote(PermissionUser, String)
    Prefer PermissionsEx.getApi().getLadderManager().promote(user, ladderName) (modern dev.rono.permissions.api.ladder.LadderManager). This method remains for binary compatibility with hook plugins compiled against older releases.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.setGroups(String[])
    Use PermissionEntity.setParentsIdentifier(List) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.setGroups(String[], String)
    Use PermissionEntity.setParentsIdentifier(List, String) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.setGroups(PermissionGroup[])
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List) instead.
    ru.tehkode.permissions.PermissionUser.setGroups(PermissionGroup[], String)
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List, String) instead.
